title: Mandalore (disambiguation)
content:
'''Mandalore''' could refer to:
==Canon==
*'''[[Imperial Academy of Mandalore]]'''
*'''[[Mandalore]]''', or '''Mand'alor''', the colonized [[homeworld]] of the [[Mandalorian]]s.
*The '''[[Mandalorian|Mandalore]]''', or '''Mand'alor''', a title used by some in reference to the Mandalorians as a whole.
*'''''[[Mandalore (title)|Mand'alor]]''''', or '''Mandalore''', the traditional leader of the Mandalorians. Or one of the bearers of the title:
**[[Mandalore the Great]]
**[[Tarre Vizsla]]
**[[Pre Vizsla]]
**[[Bo-Katan Kryze]]

Mandalore could also refer to:
*The [[Mandalore sector|'''Mandalore''' sector]], also known as "Mandalorian space"
*The [[Mandalore system|'''Mandalore''' system]]
*The Mandalore [[Star system|system's]] [[star]], '''[[Mandalore (star)|Mandalore]]'''

==Legends==
*'''[[Mandalore/Legends|Mandalore]]''', the colonized [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of the [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorians]].
*The '''[[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalore]]''', a title used by some in reference to the Mandalorians as a whole.
*'''[[Mandalore (title)/Legends|Mandalore]]''', or '''''Mand'alor''''', the traditional leader of the Mandalorians. Or one of the bearers of the title:
**[[Mandalore the First]]
**[[Mandalore the Indomitable]]
**[[Mandalore the Ultimate]]
**[[Unidentified Mandalore]]
**[[Canderous Ordo|Mandalore the Preserver]]
**[[Mandalore the Lesser]]
**[[Mandalore the Vindicated]]
**[[Mandalore the Avenger]], also known as Shae Vizla
**[[Unidentified Mandalore (Durge)|a Mandalore]] killed by [[Durge/Legends|Durge]]
**[[Jaster Mereel]]
**[[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]]
**[[Spar|Mandalore the Resurrector]], also known as [[Alpha-class Advanced Recon Commando|Alpha]]-Ø2, or "Spar"
**[[Fenn Shysa]]
**[[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]]
**[[Chernan Ordo]]
**[[Yaga Auchs]]

Mandalore could also refer to:
*The [[Mandalore sector/Legends|'''Mandalore''' sector]], also known as "Mandalorian space"
*The [[Mandalore system/Legends|'''Mandalore''' system]]
*The Mandalore [[Star system/Legends|system's]] [[Star/Legends|star]], '''[[Mandalore (star)/Legends|Mandalore]]'''

|ja=マンダロア（曖昧さ回避）
}}
